def count_pairs(array, k):
    pairs = set()
    for i in range(len(array)):
        for j in range(i + 1, len(array)):
            a = array[i]

                pairs.add((a, b))

    pairs = set()
    for i in range(len(array)):
        for j in range(i + 1, len(array)):
